testCase.name: InventarioComponent should create the component
InventarioComponent should initialise with list view mode
InventarioComponent should load inventory on init
InventarioComponent should handle error when loading inventory
InventarioComponent should count low-stock products
InventarioComponent should return 0 when no low-stock products
InventarioComponent should calculate total inventory value using purchasePrice
InventarioComponent should fallback to productionCost when purchasePrice is 0
InventarioComponent should fallback to salePrice as last resort
InventarioComponent should return 0 when all prices are 0
InventarioComponent should set filter to lowstock
InventarioComponent should set filter to category
InventarioComponent should set filter to all
InventarioComponent should reset paginator on filter change
InventarioComponent should trigger filter on search change
InventarioComponent should disable salePrice and enable wastePercent for INSUMO
InventarioComponent should enable salePrice and disable wastePercent for ELABORADO
InventarioComponent should enable salePrice and disable wastePercent for TRANSFORMADO
InventarioComponent should enable both salePrice and wastePercent for other types
InventarioComponent should clear componentsFormArray on type change
InventarioComponent should add a component with default values
InventarioComponent remove a component by index
InventarioComponent should switch to add view mode
InventarioComponent should clear composition array on openAddForm
InventarioComponent should clear error message on openAddForm
InventarioComponent should switch to edit view mode
InventarioComponent should patch form values on openEditForm
InventarioComponent should not add composition when composition is empty
InventarioComponent should use productionCost when purchasePrice is missing
InventarioComponent should switch back to list view mode on closeForm
InventarioComponent should mark form as touched and not submit if invalid
InventarioComponent should call create when viewMode is add and form is valid
InventarioComponent should call addComposicion after create when product has composition
InventarioComponent should NOT call addComposicion when id is 0
InventarioComponent should log error when create fails
InventarioComponent should log error when addComposicion fails
InventarioComponent should call update when viewMode is edit and form is valid
InventarioComponent should show error when update fails
InventarioComponent should call openAddForm again when secondary action is chosen after create
InventarioComponent should go to list when dialog closes with primary action
InventarioComponent should go to list when dialog closes with close action
InventarioComponent openDeleteModal should open confirm dialog
InventarioComponent confirmDelete should call delete service and open success dialog when confirmed
InventarioComponent confirmDelete should open error dialog when delete fails
InventarioComponent should call registrarEntrada when dialog returns a result
InventarioComponent should NOT call registrarEntrada when entrada dialog is cancelled
InventarioComponent should log error when registrarEntrada fails
InventarioComponent should call ajustarInventario when dialog returns a result
InventarioComponent should NOT call ajustarInventario when ajuste dialog is cancelled
InventarioComponent should log error when ajustarInventario fails
InventarioComponent filterPredicate should match by name
InventarioComponent filterPredicate should match by id
InventarioComponent filterPredicate should filter by lowstock
InventarioComponent filterPredicate should filter by category
InventarioComponent filterPredicate should pass all when category filter has no selectedCategory
InventarioComponent sortingDataAccessor should return lowercase name
InventarioComponent sortingDataAccessor should return type
InventarioComponent sortingDataAccessor should return stock
InventarioComponent sortingDataAccessor should return empty string for unknown property
InventarioComponent should trigger pending add stock modal if id is present
InventarioComponent should handle error when registrarEntrada fails
InventarioComponent should handle error when ajustarInventario fails
InventarioComponent should load composition in edit form if present
InventarioComponent should handle error when delete fails
InventarioComponent should mark all as touched if form is invalid on save
